metadata.author: Juan Antonio Breña Moral
metadata.title: Add Maven dependencies for improved code quality
metadata.description: ArchUnit Maven dependency guidance for the interactive Maven dependencies skill.

prompt.role: You are a Senior software engineer with extensive experience in Java software development.
prompt.goal: Add ArchUnit only when the user selects architecture testing support in the SKILL.md question flow.

constraints.constraints-description: ArchUnit is a test dependency used to enforce architectural rules in the normal test lifecycle.

constraint-list.constraint: Use `archunit-junit5` when JUnit 5 is the test framework.
Do not add ArchUnit when the user skipped architecture testing support.

step.step-content:
After adding ArchUnit, recommend running:
```bash ./mvnw test ```
If an architecture test is added, a focused check can use:
```bash ./mvnw test -Dtest="*ArchitectureTest" ```
